title: Material Replacement Cost Comparator
description: Industrial-grade tool to compare total cost of ownership and operational impact of replacing a current material with an alternative, incorporating quality, logistics, and risk factors.

inputs.label: Current Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit for the current material.

label_i18n.fr: Coût actuel des matières par unité
label_i18n.es: Coste Actual de Material por Unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit for the current material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut malzeme için birim başına doğrudan malzeme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Materialkosten pro Einheit für das aktuelle Material.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct des matières par unité pour la matière actuelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste directo de material por unidad para el material actual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة المواد المباشرة لكل وحدة للمادة الحالية.

inputs.label: Alternative Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit for the alternative material.

label_i18n.fr: Coût des matières alternatives par unité
label_i18n.es: Coste de Material Alternativo por Unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit for the alternative material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alternatif malzeme için birim başına doğrudan malzeme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Materialkosten pro Einheit für das alternative Material.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct des matières par unité pour la matière alternative.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste directo de material por unidad para el material alternativo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة المواد المباشرة لكل وحدة للمادة البديلة.

inputs.label: Annual Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced or purchased per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced or purchased per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda üretilen veya satın alınan toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der pro Jahr produzierten oder gekauften Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites ou achetées par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades producidas o compradas por año.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوحدات المنتجة أو المشتراة سنويًا.

inputs.label: Current Scrap Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with current material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with current material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut malzeme ile kusurlar nedeniyle hurdaya ayrılan birimlerin yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der aufgrund von Fehlern mit aktuellem Material ausgeschossenen Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités mises au rebut en raison de défauts avec la matière actuelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades desechadas por defectos con el material actual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الوحدات المهدورة بسبب العيوب باستخدام المادة الحالية.

inputs.label: Alternative Scrap Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with alternative material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with alternative material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alternatif malzeme ile kusurlar nedeniyle hurdaya ayrılan birimlerin yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der aufgrund von Fehlern mit alternativem Material ausgeschossenen Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités mises au rebut en raison de défauts avec la matière alternative.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades desechadas por defectos con el material alternativo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الوحدات المهدورة بسبب العيوب باستخدام المادة البديلة.

inputs.label: Current Logistics Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for current material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for current material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut malzeme için birim başına nakliye, elleçleme ve depolama maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Transport-, Handhabungs- und Lagerkosten pro Einheit für aktuelles Material.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de transport, manutention et entreposage par unité pour la matière actuelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de transporte, manipulación y almacenamiento por unidad para el material actual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة النقل والمناولة والتخزين لكل وحدة للمادة الحالية.

inputs.label: Alternative Logistics Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for alternative material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for alternative material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alternatif malzeme için birim başına nakliye, elleçleme ve depolama maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Transport-, Handhabungs- und Lagerkosten pro Einheit für alternatives Material.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de transport, manutention et entreposage par unité pour la matière alternative.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de transporte, manipulación y almacenamiento por unidad para el material alternativo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة النقل والمناولة والتخزين لكل وحدة للمادة البديلة.

inputs.label: One-time Changeover Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to retool, test, and qualify the alternative material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to retool, test, and qualify the alternative material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alternatif malzemeyi yeniden takımlandırma, test etme ve kalifiye etme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Umrüstung, Test und Qualifizierung des alternativen Materials.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de réoutillage, de test et de qualification du matériau alternatif.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de reequipamiento, prueba y calificación del material alternativo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة إعادة التجهيز والاختبار وتأهيل المادة البديلة.

rules.condition: scrap_rate_current >= 0 AND scrap_rate_current <= 100 AND scrap_rate_alternative >= 0 AND scrap_rate_alternative <= 100
rules.message: Scrap rates must be between 0 and 100.
Annual volume must be greater than zero.

thresholds.alert: The alternative material results in a net cost increase. Reconsider replacement.
Alternative scrap rate exceeds 10% – high quality risk.
Alternative supplier reliability is poor – consider supply chain risk.
Currency risk above 5% – financial exposure significant.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
